semantics: The signal number maps to Bun's canonical SIG-prefixed event name using the pinned insertion order, so aliases such as SIGIOT do not replace SIGABRT.
The selected realm's process EventEmitter is invoked synchronously with signal name then native signal number.
Signal delivery never broadcasts to sibling or foreign realms.
Ordinary EventEmitter listener ordering, once removal, and this binding are preserved.
A listener-thrown value becomes the selected VM's pending private exception and later listeners are not invoked.
Null or dead globals, unknown signal numbers, and a pre-existing pending exception are inert.
The Home and Bun profile libraries compile, link, and run one external consumer against the export.
